name: BEAR SHOOTER くまっとシューティング
slug: bear-shooter-くまっとシューティング
short_description: Simple vertical scrolling shooter with a bear as the main character, 5 stages in total
detailed_description:
Description
Simple vertical scrolling shooter with a bear as the main character, 5 stages in total
BEARMAN, a bear that can fly, goes on an adventure in search of honey.

SystemVertical scrolling shooter game with a look-down perspective. Defeat the enemies approaching from the top of the screen, and defeat the bosses that await you in each stage. You can also aim to update your score.

Feature
・Subweapon changes when you take an item dropped by a rare enemy.
・No power down
・Screen resolution is 3:4 (1920*1080 for titles only)

Basic Operationscursor key / movement
Z / attack
X / bomb
ESC / pause
